name: pagespeed
dockerfile:
FROM node:20-slim

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package.json and package-lock.json
COPY shared/modules/tools/osint/pagespeed-mcp/package.json ./package.json
COPY shared/modules/tools/osint/pagespeed-mcp/package-lock.json ./package-lock.json

# Install production dependencies only, skip prepare script (which tries to build)
# The dist directory is already compiled, so we don't need to build
RUN npm ci --production --ignore-scripts

# Copy the pre-compiled dist directory
COPY shared/modules/tools/osint/pagespeed-mcp/dist ./dist

# Run the MCP server
ENTRYPOINT ["node", "dist/index.js"]
description: MCP PageSpeed Server - Perform comprehensive web performance analysis using Google PageSpeed Insights API. Provides performance metrics, Core Web Vitals, SEO analysis, accessibility audits, and best practices assessment.
